build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(80, 50, 2)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(4).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=2).rect(60, 40).extrude(1)

STEP 4: Create mounting bosses — .faces("<X").workplane().moveTo(15, 20).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()
        .faces(">X").workplane().moveTo(65, 20).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()
        .faces("<Y").workplane().moveTo(40, 15).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()
        .faces(">Y").workplane().moveTo(40, 35).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()

STEP 5: Add cable slot — .faces("<Z").workplane(offset=2).rect(20, 5).extrude(1)
